statement: Perfect Skull is the highest quality skull gem. Weapon: 3% mana stolen, 3% life stolen. Helm: Replenish Life +4, Attacker Takes 8 damage. Shield: All Resistances +12. Key use: crafting Blood/Caster/Hitpower/Safety recipes. High value trade item for crafting.

Perfect Amethyst gem. Weapon: +150 to Attack Rating. Helm: +22 to Strength. Shield: +18% Enhanced Defense. Cube recipe: 3 Perfect Amethysts → upgrade one amethyst tier. Used in some crafting and socket recipes. Drops from mid-game monsters.
Perfect Ruby gem. Weapon: +15-25 Fire Damage. Helm: +38 to Life. Shield: Fire Resistance +24%. Very commonly socketed in helms for life bonus during leveling. Drops from mid-game areas.
Perfect Sapphire gem. Weapon: +10-14 Cold Damage (3 second freeze). Helm: +24 to Mana. Shield: Cold Resistance +24%. Often used in mana helms for caster builds during leveling.

Perfect Topaz gem. Weapon: +1-40 Lightning Damage. Helm: +24 to Mana. Shield: Lightning Resistance +24%. Most important use: socketing Normal armor/helms to boost Magic Find (MF)! Armor: +24% MF. Flawless Topaz gives +20% MF. Used by all MF builds in early/mid game.

Perfect Emerald gem. Weapon: +100 Poison Damage over 7 sec. Helm: +16 to Dexterity. Shield: Poison Resistance +24%. Weapon use is key for NecroMancer Poison builds. Shield resist gem of choice for poison resist.

Perfect Diamond gem. Weapon: +68-75% Enhanced Damage vs Undead. Helm: +34% Damage to Undead. Shield: All Resistances +19%. Best gem for all-resist shield socketing. Main use: all-resist shields, also valuable for Cube upgrading and crafting.

Flawless Topaz gem. Armor: +20% Better Chance of Getting Magic Items (MF). Very important for early-game MF farming in Normal/Nightmare mode. Obtainable before end-game. 3 Flawless Topaz + normal armor = easy MF boost. Upgrade: 3 Flawless Topaz → 1 Perfect Topaz (cube).

Horadric Cube gem upgrade recipe: 3 gems of the same type and quality → 1 gem of next quality tier. Works for all gem types. Flawed → Normal → Flawless → Perfect. Example: 3 Perfect Rubies → cannot upgrade (already max). Example: 3 Flawless Topaz → 1 Perfect Topaz. This is the primary way to obtain Perfect gems early.
